# Luis Merino — Personal Website

> Human-AI interaction researcher exploring trust, collaboration, and decision-making between humans and machines.

This site contains research papers, blog articles, interactive demos, and strategic analysis profiles.

## Author

Luis Merino
Website: https://lmerinoev.github.io
X / Twitter: https://x.com/HipsterCow

## Sections

### Research
Academic papers on human-robot interaction, trust formation in AI systems, and collaborative decision-making.

- [Decision-making with Humanoid Robots](https://lmerinoev.github.io/research/decision-making-humanoid-robot.html)
- [Trust in Human-Machine Teams](https://lmerinoev.github.io/research/trust-human-machine-teams.html)
- [Human-Robot Interaction Studies](https://lmerinoev.github.io/research/human-robot-interaction-studies.html)
- [Trust Formation in AI Systems](https://lmerinoev.github.io/research/trust-formation-ai-systems.html)

### Blog
Written by Luis Merino. Analysis of research papers with source attribution.

- [Sleeper Agents: Training Deceptive LLMs](https://lmerinoev.github.io/blog/sleeper-agents.html) — Paper by Hubinger, Denison, Mu et al. at Anthropic (2024)

### Labs (Interactive Demos)
Browser-based experiments in computer vision, audio, and AI.

- [Trust in AI Demo](https://lmerinoev.github.io/trust-demo.html)
- [Drum Machine](https://lmerinoev.github.io/labs/drum-machine.html)
- [Jarvis Face HUD](https://lmerinoev.github.io/labs/jarvis-hud.html)
- [Generative Art](https://lmerinoev.github.io/labs/generative-art.html)
- [Emotion Detection](https://lmerinoev.github.io/emotion-detection.html)
- [Pose Estimation](https://lmerinoev.github.io/pose-estimation.html)
- [Object Tracking](https://lmerinoev.github.io/object-tracking.html)
- [Augmented Reality](https://lmerinoev.github.io/ar-demo.html)

### Analysis (Strategic Intelligence Briefs)
Leadership profiles and strategic analysis.

- [Alexandr Wang](https://lmerinoev.github.io/analysis/alexandr-wang/index.html)
- [Dario Amodei](https://lmerinoev.github.io/analysis/dario-amodei/index.html)
- [Jensen Huang](https://lmerinoev.github.io/analysis/jensen-huang/index.html)
- [Jony Ive](https://lmerinoev.github.io/analysis/jony-ive/index.html)
- [Rick Rubin](https://lmerinoev.github.io/analysis/rick-rubin/index.html)
